TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_kinmkilux, title = kinmkilux, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/kinmkilux} }

S.FORM: Talagay kinmkilux wagi qani. kinmkilux balay qu kayal wayal qani.
Talagay kinmkilux wagi qani. kinmkilux balay qu kayal wayal qani.
S.PHON: talaɣaj kinmkilux waɣi qani. kinmkilux βalaj qu kajal wajal qani.
